textByHash.04ca465fd898709e7fc39b553060b9fa9f4b2dc0: One as pious as you has certainly earned the right to wear one, but the monastery requires a donation of 99000 coins for the privilege.
textByHash.04f8ad0ba437a6f394a40613a655e50c1c89a45a: Okay, come back and talk to me when you're ready to try scaring Oziach!
textByHash.0636d0c6b3f00f8ce97fc4fa8737061f651e5257: Not a lot really. I did shake it earlier and the ghost got pretty angry with me, so I'd probably avoid doing that too much.
textByHash.094a0e985cd10e41dd149602e9bc3578960cbff4: I can tell you about holy symbols or the Skillcape of Prayer.
textByHash.0ac4361b5fdea5c2adfd7c4157aecd720e88a7b2: Are you any good at climbing trees?
textByHash.0f5677c3411a059aa3e12f52ed1126f3e6bfd619: You don't need a coupon anymore!
textByHash.0feaabedfd5f25c53f75be122991cee97a7ff1e8: There you go. You can blow into the top to make a spooky sound.
textByHash.0ff8ec6ae5f4ec49c0be4a74fce7c3b25065909c: I'll make sure not to say that to her face if we meet!
textByHash.14030195b6dce727f2aa09aefdd1e10cffb2f75b: Hello! I was just passing by and saw you both in here.
textByHash.1544eb7225e53c7bc860ff46981e50b47c6c00af: Be careful, make sure you don't get too close to him, or take too long, he'll be sure to spot you!
textByHash.15e5e5709077a85ebd1f187102d3f0e721975422: Hello! I saw an old lady sneaking around in the trees south of the monastery, that wouldn't be anything to do with you, would it?
textByHash.17d305e1e82301645fa04e13c0ef3ac56f77275f: We've tried everything, there is nothing!
textByHash.192c93f19778d3b8004a6975103702a16f81c3c4: I hear Oziach has been scared, thank you! And thank your friend too.
textByHash.2873745fbe67b213fbf7c88a659e56510ac8f6d6: Good luck, I hope you find a good accomplice!
textByHash.2c8f4d33bd3c89c693391650217f05cb9973f76f: There you go. Now I'll be off, I've got a monastery to look after!
textByHash.3043f11ccc4341139193f5118ce87bbde129cea4: Thank Saradomin that you came! We need help! Oziach is trying to buy the monastery!
textByHash.31faeec1fdcf600f9b3617aadbdfa567199660e8: Lovely! Where are you meeting the candidates?
textByHash.38c5c57272a0ec45df10ab626a9930c69327476b: Hello . I thank you for helping us, we've been running out of ideas!
textByHash.3ab04f6c4f72989bb28fde45c80ad053211b71d3: Don't wait too long, the purchase will go through soon!
textByHash.3bc211712de2a386c8bb974a6a461e5ff8b19e7f: Iffie had something she wanted to give you, you should talk to her.
textByHash.3d08b4e864b43268d2141a3d3af204127894ba2f: Ah yes, don't worry about that. I have this pre-paid ad coupon you can use.
textByHash.43ce9829f349dde16dbd948c36c6e06ae555befe: Hmm... you could try placing an ad in the Varrock Herald. You can speak to Benny by the protesters in Varrock Square to do this.
textByHash.4449268d2cbd1e01b54385be85dc2cb86f3bf101: But the monastery is saved, so I don't need it anymore. I'd like you to have it!
textByHash.4a9017455cbc851404142ec89084b109fe56719e: I would, but I don't feel too well from all the stress.
textByHash.51fa37d1170bc1f1df9b1be904847b619638c195: Well, come back and see me when you do.
textByHash.552fc84c340320c6ef7514883dececb823ee15ab: There you go, try not to lose this one!
textByHash.58f1fdd904d724b985799470ba396e43535885d8: Unfortunately all Skillcapes are only available with a free hood, it's part of a skill promotion deal; buy one get one free, you know. So you'll need to free up some inventory space before I can sell you one.
textByHash.5c4f3b8e79e6dac379d4876ce1bd19e48fa9c366: Well, I am glad you both enjoyed it! I do have something for you...
textByHash.61821896fd638a4e920c0f650648adf87ba10d34: I bought an ad spot in the paper the other week. I was going to place an ad for recruiting some new monks.
textByHash.68286b2811b1769e9ec05548ee9684b6bce2ab0d: Would you like to try that now?
textByHash.6853332639ab312f19adf8eaf0e6e529d8dc6d8b: The Cape of Prayer also increases the amount of Prayer points restored from drinking potions when it is equipped. Is there something else I can do for you?
textByHash.6a8bcf7bede7516aa55d48b98cce360c5968e107: Well I can bless that star of Saradomin you have, or I could tell you about the Skillcape of Prayer!
textByHash.6f4318905bc0af4978d3cf46c63941bca593ebaf: Take this wine bottle and climb the tree nearest Oziach, then blow on it to scare him!
textByHash.70d8d4c670356ebafc142cf721f8fa42627946c7: Here is a copy of it. I made it before I gave you the original, try not to lose this!
textByHash.7225d0b0ae486e79025cbde2f411de87981f1913: You better go and do that then, thanks again!
textByHash.72b925f88276290daf12a7b2752708912edc3991: However with everything going on right now, I think this is more important.
textByHash.788ad9c8fa977bb252f277ef537230385e8dc148: The price to place an advert is 500,000 coins. I've always had good responses to my ads in the past.
textByHash.78c5be864a044b9607748f182a537792c01c5a20: I might have looked for a solution in them... And I found one, too!
textByHash.7ef46d964cbedbf3147db2145133d2b751c270b3: It's not a reward as such, but it is interesting. I've been tidying up my office since I don't need it anymore.
textByHash.88a4e6b097f664eb33f34e26fdf62f9db6e3075c: Not a lot from down here, sorry, I'm currently dealing with this mess! Come and see me upstairs and I can assist you with your question there.
textByHash.8e5b2764b74296cb5d093b8580c42cbbf53b0e2f: Would you like to try and scare Oziach now?
textByHash.93185a7b7f8392353f6670a01719c32ede289b76: And in doing so, I found this old bottle.
textByHash.a269c446ae29f43d4da1daec67cb0e4dfc6a0e5c: It does seem quite chatty for a ghost, although it doesn't always make sense.
textByHash.abc62f60496650f4de256b2a8695c166b30681ba: Hello ! Thank you for saving the monastery, we will be forever thankful!
textByHash.b6c0420f5c5fa4d315ad8d2fb05245550678b65f: Excellent! Wear that cape with pride my friend.
textByHash.b7700a11fda96045995a21da0f6a35cce6d9e92a: I am sorry to hear that. If you should find yourself in wealthier times come back and see me.
textByHash.b808e0de3537d3e1b11cda98209181c8ad5212d9: Yes! Praise he who brings life to this world.
textByHash.c0df93843b3a27fd72fa1f6cb22a1a2460ab707b: You found somebody! Great, good luck!
textByHash.c317a787dacdae4ad1a819afe0046abe8c502b79: Well, seeing as you are so devout in praising the gods, I could sell you a Skillcape of Prayer, which increases the amount of Prayer points restored when drinking potions.
textByHash.cc2406a2068c020bc4a5d2fad3f5d491aee40784: That is great, thank you! Speak to me downstairs in my office though, I don't have the paperwork up here.
textByHash.cdde065ce9c08f7fbf19220db41fe1b7dd97cf09: You don't have any space for the coupon! Talk to me again once you have space.
textByHash.d558df5ea516de6cdaf792f249d801210a7551ab: Yes! There is a ghost inside, it's trapped! Would have been handy to have earlier on, really. Would have been very scary for Oziach!
textByHash.d9e2df02f8f7832a18203ee1a236396ec79daf55: If you're hiding up a tree when you do it, it should fool Oziach into thinking it's a ghost!
textByHash.dad08b1acca1c9a137388b3f62165530cd3b466f: You don't have any space for the bottle! Talk to me again once you have space.
textByHash.de9256e6bd584c2a9af88638861d46c5e91012d1: That means more than you can imagine!
textByHash.e537ba2aaf6bf082ea66c166f16cb51d12a954de: Have you placed the advert in the Varrock Herald yet?
textByHash.e54a37b8c04607f90a70829c7b725918fd4cece5: If you have a silver star, which is the holy symbol of Saradomin, then I can bless it. Then if you are wearing it, it will help you when you are praying.
textByHash.f24c1205ac6188ba8971d5aa1b977b6cdc87da2f: The Skillcape of Prayer is the hardest of all the skillcapes to get; it requires much devotion to acquire but also imbues the wearer with the ability to briefly fly!
textByHash.fa789e45a31ff9202912213895c3ebd21bc6ee9b: You can find Benny in the Varrock Square. You should talk to him about the ad.
textByHash.fb600814f78936813e535450636f299267e894ca: How about one of these wine bottles? I have loads!
textByHash.fdd02d6e0f2c058ed8d7124e2453fb12589e5ebd: Oziach is scared of ghosts! If you can climb a tree and make a scary noise, that might scare him off!
textByHash.fdd77e5cea1dd85ba2ddb00d33d8362e4478b4fb: I'd like to thank you Iffie, and you . You both saved the monastery.
